---
title: "The Rev. Rota Waitoa"
---

## The Rev. Rota Waitoa

**Dates:** (d.1866)

### Description

the first Maori deacon

### Biography

A biography and a photograph are available at
 http://jktlibrary.wordpress.com/2010/02/03/letters-by-and-about-rota-waitoa-first-maori-ordained-minister/rota-waitoa-2/

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 31st [1853]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
